subject: Quote request - bulk Rock & Metal tracks
body:
Hi Jane,

We spoke briefly at the trade show last month - I run procurement for a chain of themed cafes and we'd like to license background music for our locations.

Could you put together a quote for the following?

- 40 Rock tracks
- 25 Metal tracks
- 10 of your best-selling tracks overall (your pick)

We're a new account - I don't think we're in your system yet. Company is Oceanic Air Cafes, and you can reach me at this address.

If the pricing works we'd want to move quickly. Thanks!

Patrick Gray
Procurement, Oceanic Air Cafes
